name: Zefr Cortex
description: Zefr Cortex — brand-safety and suitability API for video content across YouTube, TikTok, Meta.

seo.title: Zefr Cortex — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Zefr Cortex: Zefr Cortex — brand-safety and suitability API for video content across YouTube, TikTok, Meta.

when_to_use: Classifying video content for brand safety in programmatic ads
Ensuring ad placement aligns with GARM brand safety standards
Building contextual ad targeting based on video content analysis
Running YouTube and CTV video classification for ad safety

pros: Covers YouTube, TikTok, and Meta placements
cons: Dependent on platform API access levels
review.verdict: Right tool for ad-tech brand suitability across walled gardens; not a platform moderation solution.
review.best_for: Advertisers and agencies needing GARM-aligned brand-safety scoring across social video.
review.not_for: Platforms moderating their own UGC or teams outside paid media.
